title: Hiring Store Manager at Godrej Nature's Basket

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Godrej Nature's Basket
jsonLd.description:
Godrej Nature's Basket is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Godrej Nature's Basket:
Godrej Nature's Basket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Nature's Basket!
